allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Who Is Watching v2.0 - Timeline-first architecture with IndexedDB

Transform extension from category-based vendor list to timeline-first
analytics intelligence panel with full persistence and working identity graph.

Key changes:
- Add IndexedDB foundation \(lib/db.js\) with sessions, events, identities, links stores
- Add identity extraction from network requests and cookies in background.js
- Create Timeline view as default with filtering \(All/Vendors/Identity/Network/Violations\)
- Fix Identity Graph to populate from network/cookie extracted data
- Add OIA Design System compliant timeline styles
- Reorder navigation: Timeline > Vendors > Identity > Data > Control
- Convert sidepanel to ES6 modules for db.js imports
- Add session persistence with 30-min idle timeout and per-domain logic

Preserved: Vendor expandable cards, Network view, Data Layer view, Inject/Control view

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Add high-performance batch rendering to prevent UI flicker

Implement smart batching system for timeline events to handle high-activity
sites \(CNN, SAP, Oracle\) without UI flicker or performance degradation.

Key changes:
- Add lib/batch-renderer.js with BatchRenderer class
  - Configurable batch timing and max batch size
  - Velocity detection \(events/second\) with threshold triggers
  - Burst collapsing for rapid same-vendor events
  - Auto-trim DOM to prevent memory bloat \(max 200 items\)
- Update sidepanel/main.js to use batch renderer
  - Push events to batcher instead of reloading timeline
  - Add renderTimelineBatch for streaming updates
  - Add renderBurstItem for collapsed event groups
  - Track user scroll position for auto-scroll behavior
- Add velocity indicator and burst styles to styles.css
  - Animated velocity badge showing events/sec during high activity
  - Mustard-accented burst items with expandable event list

Success criteria met:
- No flicker on high-activity sites
- Velocity indicator shows rate during bursts
- Rapid vendor events collapse into burst items
- Timeline auto-scrolls unless user scrolls up
- DOM limited to 200 items

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: Identity Graph now extracts identities from requests and cookies

Root cause: Identity tab was empty because identities were only extracted
from global JavaScript objects, missing data flowing through network
requests and cookies.

Key changes:
- Add analyzeRequestForIdentity\(\) to hook.js
  - Extracts GA_CID, ECID, SEGMENT_ANON, MIXPANEL_ID, 6SENSE_COMPANY, FB_BROWSER_ID
  - Parses URL parameters and request bodies
- Add analyzeCookieForIdentity\(\) to hook.js
  - Extracts identities from _ga, s_vi, AMCV_, _6si, _fbp, hubspotutk, etc.
  - Emits IDENTITY_DETECTED on cookie set
- Update emitBehavioralDetection\(\) to emit identities from requests
- Update cookie setter to emit identities from tracking cookies
- Add debug logging to renderIdentityGraph\(\) for troubleshooting
- Add refresh button to Identity tab for manual re-render
- Add getIdentitiesByVendor\(\) and getEvent\(\) helpers to db.js

Verification:
- Visit site with Google Analytics -> console shows "[WIW] Identity nodes: X"
- Identity tab shows colored nodes \(GA_CID=mustard, ECID=red\)
- Click refresh button to force re-render

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
